neighborhoods.name: Valletta Centro
neighborhoods.description: UNESCO fortress capital with Baroque architecture, Caravaggio masterpieces, and harbor views from every street
neighborhoods.character: Baroque fortress, UNESCO, compact and monumental

housing.predominantType: Restored palazzo apartments and converted historic buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Valletta. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Floriana
neighborhoods.description: Garden suburb just outside Valletta's walls with the Mall gardens and main bus terminus
neighborhoods.character: Garden suburb, transit hub, just outside Valletta walls

housing.predominantType: Apartments in historic and newer buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Valletta's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Paola / Tarxien
neighborhoods.description: Southern harbor towns near megalithic Hypogeum and temples with more affordable housing
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Vittoriosa (Birgu)
neighborhoods.description: One of the Three Cities with restored waterfront, yacht marina, and growing international interest
neighborhoods.character: Historic Three Cities, marina, revitalized waterfront

housing.predominantType: Restored waterfront palazzi and historic apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
